titleStmt.title: SII 29.302: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 302. (A.R. No. B. 562 of 1961-62.) KALLŪR, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the wall of the Hanumān temple.

It states that at the instance of Sayiladinga wishing for the rule of Majalasara baini Lakshaha-voḍeya in perpetuity, certain rules were promulgated to be followed by the people of Kallūr regarding the treatment of cattle on occassions like kāra-huṇṇime, dīpāvali-pāḍya etc., as also in respect of the disposal of the dead cattle.
It is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhi, Mārgaśira śu. 6, Thursday. It corresponds to 1544 A.D., November 20, Thursday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī matu śālivāhana ṣa(śa)kavaruṣa 1466 neya krōdhināma saṁvatsarada
mārgasira śu 6 guruvāradalu śrīmatu śrīsayiladiṁgalu hiriyaru
gaḷa nirūpa baralāgi majalasarabayeni lakṣaha voḍeyarige
stira rājyavāgiyirabēkuyaṁdu kalūra grāmake māḍida kaṭṭaḷe
kāra huṁṇavedinadalu yettugaḷanu vōḍisi Āgi baniyalilau ye
ttugaḷu kaṭu bāyali Uṇusuvudu yetugaḷu Amavāsedina hodayi
U Āramāseya dinadalu maṁṇayara māḍalāgadu dīpāvaḷi pāḍyada di
vasa yavotavila holadoḷage samagavayāḷu maga basavaṁṇana
Uṇasōdu yettu satare bhaṁḍiya mēle hākivoyabēku vidhiya di
yalu naṁdiya mukhavāgi yetu Āu yeṁmegaḷige Uṇasōdu yetta
sattare Astiya nikṣipusuvadu yi mariyādeyalu takādinada gere maḷe
beḷe saṁpadina grāmake jaya yidake (yā)ru Upēkṣe māḍuvaru Avare A
ṁnyayigaḷu dharmake jaya basavana śrāpa nippārau .
Digital edition of SII 29.302 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
